name: Sensus (Xylem) Smart Metering API
what_it_does: Sensus (Xylem) REST API for advanced metering infrastructure (AMI) and smart meter data management covering electric, water, and gas utilities. Enables AI agents to manage smart meter data collection and validation from FlexNet AMI network for utility metering operations, handle interval consumption data for water, gas, and electric utility billing, access demand response and automated meter reading for utility operations automation, retrieve leak detection and water loss analytics for water utility conservation programs, manage meter health monitoring and network diagnostics for AMI infrastructure management, handle outage detection and restoration notification from smart meters, access customer engagement data and energy insight analytics for utility customer programs, retrieve meter-to-cash data flows for utility billing integration, manage endpoint commissioning and network configuration for AMI deployment, and integrate Sensus meter data with CIS, billing, and SCADA platforms.
use_cases: Collecting water meter data from utility billing agents
Detecting leaks from water conservation agents
Managing AMI network health from utility operations agents
Integrating meter data with billing from CIS integration agents
not_for: Electric-only AMI without water and gas multi-utility context
Non-utility applications without AMI infrastructure access
Small utilities without FlexNet AMI deployment
best_when: A water, gas, or electric utility using Sensus FlexNet AMI infrastructure wants AI agents to automate meter data collection, leak detection, billing integration, and AMI network management.
avoid_when: GRID/INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Sensus FlexNet AMI network automation involves critical water and energy infrastructure — automated network configuration changes or mass command execution must have safety validation and rollback capability. NERC CIP standards apply to electric utility grid operations. Water utility cyber security is increasingly regulated (America's Water Infrastructure Act); automated AMI network changes require security review. API documentation requires Sensus/Xylem partnership to access.

auth.notes: Sensus uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. API access via Xylem partner program. No public webhooks. REST API with JSON. Morrisville, North Carolina HQ (Sensus). Xylem acquired Sensus (2016, $1.7B). Xylem is public (XYL NYSE). Sensus FlexNet is the AMI RF mesh network (450 MHz). 1,800+ utility customers globally. Strong in water utility AMI (leading market position). Competes with Itron, Neptune (Roper Technologies), and Badger Meter for water meter and AMI.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-endpoint and annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per meter endpoint; AMI network services
pricing.notes: Morrisville, North Carolina. Xylem (XYL NYSE). Sensus acquired by Xylem 2016 ($1.7B). 1,800+ utility customers. FlexNet AMI is dominant in water utility AMI. Competes with Itron, Neptune (Roper), and Badger Meter for water AMI.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per partner deployment; documented per utility

known_agent_gotchas: INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Sensus FlexNet AMI is critical water/energy infrastructure; automated network configuration changes require safety validation and rollback — mass command errors can disable metering capability
Partner access requirement — Sensus API requires Xylem partner program enrollment; not self-service developer access
No webhooks — meter data event notification requires polling; no native event push for meter reads, alarms, or network events
America's Water Infrastructure Act — water utility cyber security increasingly regulated; automated AMI changes require cyber security review and documentation
FlexNet RF mesh specifics — Sensus 450 MHz FlexNet network has different characteristics than Itron/Landis mesh; range and endpoint behavior differ from other AMI vendors
Water meter data privacy — some states have water consumption privacy protections analogous to smart electric meter data; verify state requirements before automated data sharing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Water/gas/electric AMI. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Critical utility meter infrastructure data.

security_score_components.security_notes: AMI infrastructure. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Critical utility meter data.
